title: Vietnamese Cod Poached in Com Tam Broth
description: A delicate Vietnamese dish featuring cod poached in a flavorful com tam broth, served with steamed com and a side of tender tam.
instructions: Bring the com tam broth to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce heat to a simmer and add the moist fish sauce.
Add the cod fillets to the pot and poach for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the pot and place on a plate to rest.
Add the tender tam to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season the com tam broth with salt to taste.
To serve, place a cod fillet on top of a bed of steamed com, and spoon the com tam broth over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
